name: SectionBackgroundFillMode
summary: Defines how a background fill is applied to a section

enum_values.name: None
enum_values.summary: Do not fill in the background of a section

enum_values.name: Viewport
enum_values.summary: Use the current display mode settings to determine how to apply a fill. Wireframe will not fill while shaded and rendered will fill using colors and materials matching how the object is drawn.

enum_values.name: SolidColor
enum_values.summary: Use a solid color for a background fill. If BackgroundFillColor is set on this section style, then that color will be used. Otherwise, the item's color that this section style is associated will be used
